problem id: 70bc42af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  10001100 -> 11110001
  11110111 -> 11111110
  10011000 -> 11010011
  10000111 -> 11111000
  00110011 -> 11111110
  10110010 -> 11010110
  00100001 -> 00101100
  11010010 -> 11011010
  01101000 -> 01001101

query: 01010001
predicted answer: 10101010
